name: ocr
description: Detect and transcribe text in images with accurate bounding boxes, layout analysis, reding order, and table recognition, in 90 languages

file.description: Input file. Must be one of: .pdf, .doc, .docx, .ppt, .pptx, .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .webp
file.title: File

max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to process. Cannot be specified if page_range is set - these parameters are mutually exclusive
max_pages.title: Max Pages

page_range.description: Page range to parse, comma separated like 0,5-10,20. Example: '0,2-4' will process pages 0, 2, 3, and 4. Cannot be specified if max_pages is set - these parameters are mutually exclusive
page_range.title: Page Range

return_pages.description: Return detailed page information including text lines, bounding boxes, polygons, and character-level data. When disabled, only text and page_count will be returned
return_pages.title: Return Pages

skip_cache.description: Bypass the server-side cache and force re-processing. By default, identical requests are cached to save time and cost. Enable this to get fresh results
skip_cache.title: Skip Cache

visualize.description: Draw red polygons on the input image(s) to visualize detected text regions and return the annotated images
visualize.title: Visualize
